revision.comment: {{msg:旧暦3月}}、新暦換算、上杉鷹山を移動
廷臣八十八卿列参事件
[[User:Addbot|ボット]]: 言語間リンク 3 件を[[Wikipedia:ウィキデータ|ウィキデータ]]上の [[d:q839055]] に転記
[[Special:Contributions/Pslplp|Pslplp]] ([[User talk:Pslplp|会話]]) による ID:83050173 の版を[[H:RV|取り消し]]
1 revision imported: importing jawiki history before translation, of all the 12 lunar months

revision.text:
{{旧暦3月}} '''旧暦3月12日'''は[[3月 (旧暦)|旧暦3月]]の12日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]]である。
== できごと == * [[安政]]5年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1858年]][[4月25日]]） - [[廷臣八十八卿列参事件]]。[[岩倉具視]]等攘夷派公家88人、[[安政五カ国条約|修好通商条約]]勅許への反対を表明し座り込み * [[文久]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1863年]][[4月29日]]） - [[新選組]]が[[会津藩]]預かりになり、[[壬生浪士|壬生浪士組]]と名乗る。
== 誕生日 == * [[寛永]]10年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1633年]][[4月20日]]） - [[後光明天皇]]、110代[[天皇]]（+ [[1654年]]） * [[宝永]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1708年]][[5月2日]]） - [[湯浅常山]]、[[儒学者]]（+ [[1781年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[宝永]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1705年]][[4月5日]]） - [[伊藤仁斎]]、[[儒学者]]（* [[1627年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1806年]][[4月30日]]） - [[小野川喜三郎]]、5代[[横綱]]（* [[1758年]]） <!--* [[文政]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1822年]][[5月3日]]） - [[上杉鷹山]]（上杉治憲）、[[米沢藩]]主（* [[1751年]]）--「[[上杉治憲]]」の記載と差異--> <!-- 旧暦2月4日に移動* [[同治]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[4月19日]]） - [[曽国藩]]、[[清]]の政治家（* [[1811年]]）-->
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|11|3|13|2|12|4|3|0312}}
[[Category:untranslated pages]][[ja:3月12日 (旧暦)]][[Category:new pages]]

{{旧暦3月}} '''旧暦3月12日'''は[[3月 (旧暦)|旧暦3月]]の12日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]]である。
== できごと == * [[安政]]5年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1858年]][[4月25日]]） - [[廷臣八十八卿列参事件]]。[[岩倉具視]]等攘夷派公家88人、[[安政五カ国条約|修好通商条約]]勅許への反対を表明し座り込み * [[文久]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1863年]][[4月29日]]） - [[新選組]]が[[会津藩]]預かりになり、[[壬生浪士|壬生浪士組]]と名乗る。
== 誕生日 == * [[寛永]]10年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1633年]][[4月20日]]） - [[後光明天皇]]、110代[[天皇]]（+ [[1654年]]） * [[宝永]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1708年]][[5月2日]]） - [[湯浅常山]]、[[儒学者]]（+ [[1781年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[宝永]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1705年]][[4月5日]]） - [[伊藤仁斎]]、[[儒学者]]（* [[1627年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1806年]][[4月30日]]） - [[小野川喜三郎]]、5代[[横綱]]（* [[1758年]]） <!--* [[文政]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1822年]][[5月3日]]） - [[上杉鷹山]]（上杉治憲）、[[米沢藩]]主（* [[1751年]]）--「[[上杉治憲]]」の記載と差異--> <!-- 旧暦2月4日に移動* [[同治]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[4月19日]]） - [[曽国藩]]、[[清]]の政治家（* [[1811年]]）-->
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|11|3|13|2|12|4|3|0312}}

== できごと == * [[安政]]5年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1858年]][[4月25日]]） - [[廷臣八十八卿列参事件]]。[[岩倉具視]]等攘夷派公家88人、[[安政五カ国条約|修好通商条約]]勅許への反対を表明し座り込み * [[文久]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1863年]][[4月29日]]） - [[新選組]]が[[会津藩]]預かりになり、[[壬生浪士|壬生浪士組]]と名乗る。
== 誕生日 == * [[寛永]]10年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1633年]][[4月20日]]） - [[後光明天皇]]、110代[[天皇]]（+ [[1654年]]） * [[宝永]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1708年]][[5月2日]]） - [[湯浅常山]]、[[儒学者]]（+ [[1781年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[宝永]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1705年]][[4月5日]]） - [[伊藤仁斎]]、[[儒学者]]（* [[1627年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1806年]][[4月30日]]） - [[小野川喜三郎]]、5代[[横綱]]（* [[1758年]]） <!--* [[文政]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1822年]][[5月3日]]） - [[上杉鷹山]]（上杉治憲）、[[米沢藩]]主（* [[1751年]]）--「[[上杉治憲]]」の記載と差異--> <!-- 旧暦2月4日に移動* [[同治]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[4月19日]]） - [[曽国藩]]、[[清]]の政治家（* [[1811年]]）-->
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|11|3|13|2|12|4|3|0312}}

{{旧暦3月}} '''旧暦3月12日'''は[[3月 (旧暦)|旧暦3月]]の12日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]]である。
== できごと == * [[安政]]5年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1858年]][[4月25日]]） - [[廷臣八十八卿列参事件]]。[[岩倉具視]]等攘夷派公家88人、[[安政五カ国条約|修好通商条約]]勅許への反対を表明し座り込み * [[文久]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1863年]][[4月29日]]） - [[新選組]]が[[会津藩]]預かりになり、[[壬生浪士|壬生浪士組]]と名乗る。
== 誕生日 == * [[寛永]]10年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1633年]][[4月20日]]） - [[後光明天皇]]、110代[[天皇]]（+ [[1654年]]） * [[宝永]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1708年]][[5月2日]]） - [[湯浅常山]]、[[儒学者]]（+ [[1781年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[宝永]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1705年]][[4月5日]]） - [[伊藤仁斎]]、[[儒学者]]（* [[1627年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1806年]][[4月30日]]） - [[小野川喜三郎]]、5代[[横綱]]（* [[1758年]]） <!--* [[文政]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1822年]][[5月3日]]） - [[上杉鷹山]]（上杉治憲）、[[米沢藩]]主（* [[1751年]]）--「[[上杉治憲]]」の記載と差異--> <!-- Lunar February4日に移動* [[同治]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[4月19日]]） - [[曽国藩]]、[[清]]の政治家（* [[1811年]]）-->

'''March 12 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month MONTHY of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.

== できごと == * [[安政]]5年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1858年]][[4月25日]]） - [[廷臣八十八卿列参事件]]。[[岩倉具視]]等攘夷派公家88人、[[安政五カ国条約|修好通商条約]]勅許への反対を表明し座り込み * [[文久]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1863年]][[4月29日]]） - [[新選組]]が[[会津藩]]預かりになり、[[壬生浪士|壬生浪士組]]と名乗る。
== 誕生日 == * [[寛永]]10年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1633年]][[4月20日]]） - [[後光明天皇]]、110代[[天皇]]（+ [[1654年]]） * [[宝永]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1708年]][[5月2日]]） - [[湯浅常山]]、[[儒学者]]（+ [[1781年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[宝永]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1705年]][[4月5日]]） - [[伊藤仁斎]]、[[儒学者]]（* [[1627年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1806年]][[4月30日]]） - [[小野川喜三郎]]、5代[[横綱]]（* [[1758年]]） <!--* [[文政]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1822年]][[5月3日]]） - [[上杉鷹山]]（上杉治憲）、[[米沢藩]]主（* [[1751年]]）--「[[上杉治憲]]」の記載と差異--> <!-- Lunar February4日に移動* [[同治]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[4月19日]]） - [[曽国藩]]、[[清]]の政治家（* [[1811年]]）-->
== 記念日・年中行事 ==

--> == Events == * [[安政]]5年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1858年]][[4月25日]]） - [[廷臣八十八卿列参事件]]。[[岩倉具視]]等攘夷派公家88人、[[安政五カ国条約|修好通商条約]]勅許への反対を表明し座り込み * [[文久]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1863年]][[4月29日]]） - [[新選組]]が[[会津藩]]預かりになり、[[壬生浪士|壬生浪士組]]と名乗る。

== Deaths == * [[宝永]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1705年]][[4月5日]]） - [[伊藤仁斎]]、[[儒学者]]（* [[1627年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1806年]][[4月30日]]） - [[小野川喜三郎]]、5代[[横綱]]（* [[1758年]]） <!--* [[文政]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1822年]][[5月3日]]） - [[上杉鷹山]]（上杉治憲）、[[米沢藩]]主（* [[1751年]]）--「[[上杉治憲]]」の記載と差異--> <!-- Lunar February4日に移動* [[同治]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[4月19日]]） - [[曽国藩]]、[[清]]の政治家（* [[1811年]]）-->

{{Lunar March}} '''March 12 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the 12th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
<!--== {{Lunar March}} ''March 12'''<!--Lunar March12 is the Nth day of [[3月 (旧暦)|Lunar March]]の12日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]][[Category:友引]]である。
--> == Events == * [[安政]]5年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1858年]][[4月25日]]） - [[廷臣八十八卿列参事件]]。[[岩倉具視]]等攘夷派公家88人、[[安政五カ国条約|修好通商条約]]勅許への反対を表明し座り込み * [[文久]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1863年]][[4月29日]]） - [[新選組]]が[[会津藩]]預かりになり、[[壬生浪士|壬生浪士組]]と名乗る。

== Deaths == * [[宝永]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1705年]][[4月5日]]） - [[伊藤仁斎]]、[[儒学者]]（* [[1627年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1806年]][[4月30日]]） - [[小野川喜三郎]]、5代[[横綱]]（* [[1758年]]） <!--* [[文政]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1822年]][[5月3日]]） - [[上杉鷹山]]（上杉治憲）、[[米沢藩]]主（* [[1751年]]）--「[[上杉治憲]]」の記載と差異--> <!-- Lunar February4日に移動* [[同治]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[4月19日]]） - [[曽国藩]]、[[清]]の政治家（* [[1811年]]）-->

[[sn:March 12 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 3월 12일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月12日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 12일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十二]] [[zh:三月十二]] [[en:draft:March 12 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar March}} '''March 12''' is the 12th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
== Events == * [[安政]]5年（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1858]][[4月25日]]） - [[廷臣八十八卿列参事件]]。[[岩倉具視]]等攘夷派公家88人、[[安政五カ国条約|修好通商条約]]勅許への反対を表明し座り込み * [[文久]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1863]][[4月29日]]） - [[新選組]]が[[会津藩]]預かりになり、[[壬生浪士|壬生浪士組]]と名乗る。
== Births == * [[寛永]]10年（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1633]][[4月20日]]） - [[後光明天皇]]、110代[[天皇]]（+ [[1654]]） * [[宝永]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1708]][[5月2日]]） - [[湯浅常山]]、[[儒学者]]（+ [[1781]]）
== Deaths == * [[宝永]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1705]][[4月5日]]） - [[伊藤仁斎]]、[[儒学者]]（* [[1627]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1806]][[4月30日]]） - [[小野川喜三郎]]、5代[[横綱]]（* [[1758]]） <「[[上杉治憲]]」の記載と差異-->

[[sn:March 12 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 3월 12일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月12日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 12일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十二]] [[zh:三月十二]] [[en:draft:March 12 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar March}} '''March 12''' is the 12th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
== Events == * [[安政]]5年（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1858]][[4月25日]]） - [[廷臣八十八卿列参事件]]。[[岩倉具視]]等攘夷派公家88人、[[安政五カ国条約|修好通商条約]]勅許への反対を表明し座り込み * [[文久]]3rd year（グレゴリオ暦[[1863]][[4月29日]]） - [[新選組]]が[[会津藩]]預かりになり、[[壬生浪士|壬生浪士組]]と名乗る。
== Births == * [[寛永]]10年（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1633]][[4月20日]]） - [[後光明天皇]]、110代[[天皇]]（+ [[1654]]） * [[宝永]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1708]][[5月2日]]） - [[湯浅常山]]、[[儒学者]]（+ [[1781]]）
== Deaths == * [[宝永]]2nd year（グレゴリオ暦[[1705]][[4月5日]]） - [[伊藤仁斎]]、[[儒学者]]（* [[1627]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]3rd year（グレゴリオ暦[[1806]][[4月30日]]） - [[小野川喜三郎]]、5代[[横綱]]（* [[1758]]） <「[[上杉治憲]]」の記載と差異-->
== Commemorations ==

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
== Events == * [[安政]]5th year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1858]][[4月25日]]） - [[廷臣八十八卿列参事件]]。[[岩倉具視]]等攘夷派公家88人、[[安政五カ国条約|修好通商条約]]勅許への反対を表明し座り込み * [[文久]]3rd year（グレゴリオ暦[[1863]][[4月29日]]） - [[新選組]]が[[会津藩]]預かりになり、[[壬生浪士|壬生浪士組]]と名乗る。
== Births == * [[寛永]]10th year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1633]][[4月20日]]） - [[後光明天皇]]、110代[[天皇]]（+ [[1654]]） * [[宝永]]5th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1708]][[5月2日]]） - [[湯浅常山]]、[[儒学者]]（+ [[1781]]）
== Deaths == * [[宝永]]2nd year（グレゴリオ暦[[1705]][[4月5日]]） - [[伊藤仁斎]]、[[儒学者]]（* [[1627]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]3rd year（グレゴリオ暦[[1806]][[4月30日]]） - [[小野川喜三郎]]、5代[[横綱]]（* [[1758]]） <「[[上杉治憲]]」の記載と差異-->
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|11|3|13|2|12|4|3|0312}}

[[sn:March 12 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 12일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月12日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 12일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十二]] [[zh:三月十二]] [[en:draft:March 12 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 12''' is the 12th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1858]] [[4月25日]] ） - [[廷臣八十八卿列参事件]] 。[[岩倉具視]] 等攘夷派公家88人、[[安政五カ国条約|修好通商条約]] 勅許への反対を表明し座り込み * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[4月29日]] ） - [[新選組]] が[[会津藩]] 預かりになり、[[壬生浪士|壬生浪士組]] と名乗る。
== Births == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 10th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1633]] [[4月20日]] ） - [[後光明天皇]] 、110代[[天皇]] （+ [[1654]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1708]] [[5月2日]] ） - [[湯浅常山]] 、[[儒学者]] （+ [[1781]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1705]] [[4月5日]] ） - [[伊藤仁斎]] 、[[儒学者]] （* [[1627]] ） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1806]] [[4月30日]] ） - [[小野川喜三郎]] 、5代[[横綱]] （* [[1758]] ） <「[[上杉治憲]] 」の記載と差異-->
== Commemorations ==

revision.comment: doing mass replacement for all western dates to english
revision.text:
[[sn:March 12 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 12일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月12日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 12일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十二]] [[zh:三月十二]] [[en:draft:March 12 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 12''' is the 12th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1858]] [[April 25]] ） - [[廷臣八十八卿列参事件]] 。[[岩倉具視]] 等攘夷派公家88人、[[安政五カ国条約|修好通商条約]] 勅許への反対を表明し座り込み * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[April 29]] ） - [[新選組]] が[[会津藩]] 預かりになり、[[壬生浪士|壬生浪士組]] と名乗る。
== Births == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 10th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1633]] [[April 20]] ） - [[後光明天皇]] 、110代[[天皇]] （+ [[1654]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1708]] [[May 2]] ） - [[湯浅常山]] 、[[儒学者]] （+ [[1781]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1705]] [[April 5]] ） - [[伊藤仁斎]] 、[[儒学者]] （* [[1627]] ） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1806]] [[April 30]] ） - [[小野川喜三郎]] 、5代[[横綱]] （* [[1758]] ） <「[[上杉治憲]] 」の記載と差異-->
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|11|3|13|2|12|4|3|0312}}

[[sn:March 12 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 12일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月12日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 12일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十二]] [[zh:三月十二]] [[en:draft:March 12 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 12''' is the 12th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1858]] [[April 25]] ） - [[廷臣八十八卿列参事件]] 。[[岩倉具視]] 等攘夷派公家88人、[[安政五カ国条約|修好通商条約]] 勅許への反対を表明し座り込み * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[April 29]] ） - [[新選組]] が[[会津藩]] 預かりになり、[[壬生浪士|壬生浪士組]] と名乗る。
== Births == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 10th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1633]] [[April 20]] ） - [[後光明天皇]] 、110代[[天皇]] （+ [[1654]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1708]] [[May 2]] ） - [[湯浅常山]] 、[[儒学者]] （+ [[1781]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1705]] [[April 5]] ） - [[伊藤仁斎]] 、[[儒学者]] （* [[1627]] ） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1806]] [[April 30]] ） - [[小野川喜三郎]] 、5代[[横綱]] （* [[1758]] ） <「[[上杉治憲]] 」の記載と差異-->
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|11|3|13|2|12|4|3|0312}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Lunisolar}}" to "{{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}}"
revision.text:
[[sn:March 12 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 12일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月12日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 12일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十二]] [[zh:三月十二]] [[en:draft:March 12 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 12''' is the 12th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1858]] [[April 25]] ） - [[廷臣八十八卿列参事件]] 。[[岩倉具視]] 等攘夷派公家88人、[[安政五カ国条約|修好通商条約]] 勅許への反対を表明し座り込み * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[April 29]] ） - [[新選組]] が[[会津藩]] 預かりになり、[[壬生浪士|壬生浪士組]] と名乗る。
== Births == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 10th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1633]] [[April 20]] ） - [[後光明天皇]] 、110代[[天皇]] （+ [[1654]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1708]] [[May 2]] ） - [[湯浅常山]] 、[[儒学者]] （+ [[1781]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1705]] [[April 5]] ） - [[伊藤仁斎]] 、[[儒学者]] （* [[1627]] ） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1806]] [[April 30]] ） - [[小野川喜三郎]] 、5代[[横綱]] （* [[1758]] ） <「[[上杉治憲]] 」の記載と差異-->
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|11|3|13|2|12|4|3|0312}}

[[sn:March 12 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 12일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月12日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 12일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十二]] [[zh:三月十二]] [[en:draft:March 12 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 12''' is the 12th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1858]] [[April 25]] ） - [[廷臣八十八卿列参事件]] 。[[岩倉具視]] 等攘夷派公家88人、[[安政五カ国条約|修好通商条約]] 勅許への反対を表明し座り込み * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[April 29]] ） - [[新選組]] が[[会津藩]] 預かりになり、[[壬生浪士|壬生浪士組]] と名乗る。
== Births == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 10th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1633]] [[April 20]] ） - [[後光明天皇]] 、qq0代[[天皇]] （+ [[1654]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1708]] [[May 2]] ） - [[湯浅常山]] 、[[儒学者]] （+ [[1781]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1705]] [[April 5]] ） - [[伊藤仁斎]] 、[[儒学者]] （* [[1627]] ） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1806]] [[April 30]] ） - [[小野川喜三郎]] 、5代[[横綱]] （* [[1758]] ） <「[[上杉治憲]] 」の記載と差異-->

revision.comment: Fixing the qq replacement as it causes problems in a lot of pages
revision.text:
[[sn:March 12 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 12일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月12日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 12일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十二]] [[zh:三月十二]] [[en:draft:March 12 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 12''' is the 12th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1858]] [[April 25]] ） - [[廷臣八十八卿列参事件]] 。[[岩倉具視]] 等攘夷派公家88人、[[安政五カ国条約|修好通商条約]] 勅許への反対を表明し座り込み * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[April 29]] ） - [[新選組]] が[[会津藩]] 預かりになり、[[壬生浪士|壬生浪士組]] と名乗る。
== Births == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 10th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1633]] [[April 20]] ） - [[後光明天皇]] 、110代[[天皇]] （+ [[1654]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1708]] [[May 2]] ） - [[湯浅常山]] 、[[儒学者]] （+ [[1781]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1705]] [[April 5]] ） - [[伊藤仁斎]] 、[[儒学者]] （* [[1627]] ） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1806]] [[April 30]] ） - [[小野川喜三郎]] 、5代[[横綱]] （* [[1758]] ） <「[[上杉治憲]] 」の記載と差異-->
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|11|3|13|2|12|4|3|0312}}

== Births == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 10th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1633]] [[April 20]] ） - [[後光明天皇]] 、110代[[天皇]] （+ [[1654]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1708]] [[May 2]] ） - [[湯浅常山]] 、[[儒学者]] （+ [[1781]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1705]] [[April 5]] ） - [[伊藤仁斎]] 、[[儒学者]] （* [[1627]] ） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1806]] [[April 30]] ） - [[小野川喜三郎]] 、5代[[横綱]] （* [[1758]] ） <「[[上杉治憲]] 」の記載と差異-->

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[儒学者]]" to "{{ill|Ru (Confucian)|ja|儒学者}}"
revision.text:
[[sn:March 12 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 12일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月12日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 12일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十二]] [[zh:三月十二]] [[en:draft:March 12 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 12''' is the 12th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1858]] [[April 25]] ） - [[廷臣八十八卿列参事件]] 。[[岩倉具視]] 等攘夷派公家88人、[[安政五カ国条約|修好通商条約]] 勅許への反対を表明し座り込み * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[April 29]] ） - [[新選組]] が[[会津藩]] 預かりになり、[[壬生浪士|壬生浪士組]] と名乗る。
== Births == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 10th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1633]] [[April 20]] ） - [[後光明天皇]] 、110代[[天皇]] （+ [[1654]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1708]] [[May 2]] ） - [[湯浅常山]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian)|ja|儒学者}} （+ [[1781]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1705]] [[April 5]] ） - [[伊藤仁斎]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian)|ja|儒学者}} （* [[1627]] ） * [[Bunka]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1806]] [[April 30]] ） - [[小野川喜三郎]] 、5代[[横綱]] （* [[1758]] ） <「[[上杉治憲]] 」の記載と差異-->
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|11|3|13|2|12|4|3|0312}}

[[sn:March 12 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 12일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月12日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 12일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十二]] [[zh:三月十二]] [[en:draft:March 12 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 12''' is the 12th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1858]] [[April 25]] ） - [[廷臣八十八卿列参事件]] 。[[岩倉具視]] 等攘夷派公家88人、[[安政五カ国条約|修好通商条約]] 勅許への反対を表明し座り込み * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[April 29]] ） - [[新選組]] が[[会津藩]] 預かりになり、[[壬生浪士|壬生浪士組]] と名乗る。
== Births == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 10th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1633]] [[April 20]] ） - [[後光明天皇]] 、110代[[天皇]] （+ [[1654]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1708]] [[May 2]] ） - [[湯浅常山]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （+ [[1781]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1705]] [[April 5]] ） - [[伊藤仁斎]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （* [[1627]] ） * [[Bunka]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1806]] [[April 30]] ） - [[小野川喜三郎]] 、5代[[横綱]] （* [[1758]] ） <「[[上杉治憲]] 」の記載と差異-->
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|11|3|13|2|12|4|3|0312}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1858]] [[April 25]] ） - [[廷臣八十八卿列参事件]] 。[[岩倉具視]] 等攘夷派公家88人、[[安政五カ国条約|修好通商条約]] 勅許への反対を表明し座り込み * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[April 29]] ） - [[新選組]] が[[会津藩]] 預かりになり、[[壬生浪士|壬生浪士組]] と名乗る。
== Births == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 10th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1633]] [[April 20]] ） - [[後光明天皇]] 、110代[[天皇]] （+ [[1654]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1708]] [[May 2]] ） - [[湯浅常山]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （+ [[1781]] ）

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[天皇]]" to "[[Emperor of Japan]]"
revision.text:
[[sn:March 12 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 12일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月12日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 12일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十二]] [[zh:三月十二]] [[en:draft:March 12 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 12''' is the 12th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1858]] [[April 25]] ） - [[廷臣八十八卿列参事件]] 。[[岩倉具視]] 等攘夷派公家88人、[[安政五カ国条約|修好通商条約]] 勅許への反対を表明し座り込み * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[April 29]] ） - [[新選組]] が[[会津藩]] 預かりになり、[[壬生浪士|壬生浪士組]] と名乗る。
== Births == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 10th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1633]] [[April 20]] ） - [[後光明天皇]] 、110代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[1654]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1708]] [[May 2]] ） - [[湯浅常山]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （+ [[1781]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1705]] [[April 5]] ） - [[伊藤仁斎]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （* [[1627]] ） * [[Bunka]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1806]] [[April 30]] ） - [[小野川喜三郎]] 、5代[[Yokozuna]] （* [[1758]] ） <「[[上杉治憲]] 」の記載と差異-->
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|11|3|13|2|12|4|3|0312}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .

== Births == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 10th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1633]] [[April 20]] ） - [[後光明天皇]] 、110代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[1654]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1708]] [[May 2]] ） - [[湯浅常山]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （+ [[1781]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1705]] [[April 5]] ） - [[伊藤仁斎]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （* [[1627]] ） * [[Bunka]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1806]] [[April 30]] ） - [[小野川喜三郎]] 、5代[[Yokozuna]] （* [[1758]] ） <「[[上杉治憲]] 」の記載と差異-->

[[sn:March 12 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 12일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月12日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 12일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十二]] [[zh:三月十二]] [[en:draft:March 12 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 12''' is the 12th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1858]] [[April 25]] ） - [[廷臣八十八卿列参事件]] 。[[岩倉具視]] 等攘夷派公家88人、[[安政五カ国条約|修好通商条約]] 勅許への反対を表明し座り込み * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[April 29]] ） - [[新選組]] が[[会津藩]] 預かりになり、[[壬生浪士|壬生浪士組]] と名乗る。
== Births == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 10th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1633]] [[April 20]] ） - [[後光明天皇]] 、110代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[1654]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1708]] [[May 2]] ） - [[湯浅常山]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （+ [[1781]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1705]] [[April 5]] ） - [[伊藤仁斎]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （* [[1627]] ） * [[Bunka]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1806]] [[April 30]] ） - [[小野川喜三郎]] 、5代[[Yokozuna]] （* [[1758]] ） <「[[上杉治憲]] 」の記載と差異-->
== Commemorations ==== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|11|3|13|2|12|4|3|0312}}

[[sn:March 12 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 12일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月12日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 12일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十二]] [[zh:三月十二]] [[en:draft:March 12 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 12''' is the 12th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1858]] [[April 25]] ） - [[廷臣八十八卿列参事件]] 。[[岩倉具視]] 等攘夷派公家88人、[[安政五カ国条約|修好通商条約]] 勅許への反対を表明し座り込み * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[April 29]] ） - [[新選組]] が[[会津藩]] 預かりになり、[[壬生浪士|壬生浪士組]] と名乗る。
== Births == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 10th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1633]] [[April 20]] ） - [[後光明天皇]] 、110代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[1654]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1708]] [[May 2]] ） - [[湯浅常山]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （+ [[1781]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1705]] [[April 5]] ） - [[伊藤仁斎]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （* [[1627]] ） * [[Bunka]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1806]] [[April 30]] ） - [[小野川喜三郎]] 、5代[[Yokozuna]] （* [[1758]] ） <「[[上杉治憲]] 」の記載と差異-->
== Commemorations ==

[[sn:March 12 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 12일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月12日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 12일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十二]] [[zh:三月十二]] [[en:draft:March 12 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 12''' is the 12th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1858]] [[April 25]] ） - [[廷臣八十八卿列参事件]] 。[[岩倉具視]] 等攘夷派公家88人、[[安政五カ国条約|修好通商条約]] 勅許への反対を表明し座り込み * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[April 29]] ） - [[新選組]] が[[Aizu Domain]] 預かりになり、[[壬生浪士|壬生浪士組]] と名乗る。
== Births == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 10th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1633]] [[April 20]] ） - [[後光明天皇]] 、110代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[1654]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1708]] [[May 2]] ） - [[湯浅常山]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （+ [[1781]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1705]] [[April 5]] ） - [[伊藤仁斎]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （* [[1627]] ） * [[Bunka]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1806]] [[April 30]] ） - [[小野川喜三郎]] 、5代[[Yokozuna]] （* [[1758]] ） <「[[上杉治憲]] 」の記載と差異-->
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|11|3|13|2|12|4|3|0312}}

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] to [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
[[sn:March 12 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 12일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月12日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 12일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十二]] [[zh:三月十二]] [[en:draft:March 12 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 12''' is the 12th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1858]] [[April 25]] ） - [[廷臣八十八卿列参事件]] 。[[岩倉具視]] 等攘夷派公家88人、[[安政五カ国条約|修好通商条約]] 勅許への反対を表明し座り込み * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[April 29]] ） - [[新選組]] が[[Aizu Domain]] 預かりになり、[[壬生浪士|壬生浪士組]] と名乗る。
== Births == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 10th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1633]] [[April 20]] ） - [[後光明天皇]] 、110代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[1654]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1708]] [[May 2]] ） - [[湯浅常山]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （+ [[1781]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1705]] [[April 5]] ） - [[伊藤仁斎]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （* [[1627]] ） * [[Bunka]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1806]] [[April 30]] ） - [[小野川喜三郎]] 、5代[[Yokozuna]] （* [[1758]] ） <「[[上杉治憲]] 」の記載と差異-->
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|11|3|13|2|12|4|3|0312}}

revision.text:
[[cdo:3 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十二]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 12''' is the 12th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1858]] [[April 25]] ） - [[廷臣八十八卿列参事件]] 。[[岩倉具視]] 等攘夷派公家88人、[[安政五カ国条約|修好通商条約]] 勅許への反対を表明し座り込み * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[April 29]] ） - [[新選組]] が[[Aizu Domain]] 預かりになり、[[壬生浪士|壬生浪士組]] と名乗る。
== Births == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 10th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1633]] [[April 20]] ） - [[後光明天皇]] 、110代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[1654]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1708]] [[May 2]] ） - [[湯浅常山]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （+ [[1781]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1705]] [[April 5]] ） - [[伊藤仁斎]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （* [[1627]] ） * [[Bunka]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1806]] [[April 30]] ） - [[小野川喜三郎]] 、5代[[Yokozuna]] （* [[1758]] ） <「[[上杉治憲]] 」の記載と差異-->
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|11|3|13|2|12|4|3|0312}}

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Untranslated Lunar Calendar Days]] to [[Category:Pages to be translated]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:Pages to be translated]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
[[cdo:3 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十二]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 12''' is the 12th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March|12=draft}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft}} 5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1858]] [[April 25]] ） - [[廷臣八十八卿列参事件]] 。[[岩倉具視]] 等攘夷派公家88人、[[安政五カ国条約|修好通商条約]] 勅許への反対を表明し座り込み * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久|12=draft}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[April 29]] ） - [[新選組]] が[[Aizu Domain]] 預かりになり、[[壬生浪士|壬生浪士組]] と名乗る。
== Births == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft}} 10th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1633]] [[April 20]] ） - [[後光明天皇]] 、110代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[1654]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永|12=draft}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1708]] [[May 2]] ） - [[湯浅常山]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=draft}} （+ [[1781]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永|12=draft}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1705]] [[April 5]] ） - [[伊藤仁斎]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=draft}} （* [[1627]] ） * [[Bunka]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1806]] [[April 30]] ） - [[小野川喜三郎]] 、5代[[Yokozuna]] （* [[1758]] ） <「[[上杉治憲]] 」の記載と差異-->
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|11|3|13|2|12|4|3|0312}}

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1858]] {{ill|April 25|ja|4月25日}}) – In the event known as {{ill|Teimin Hachijukkyo Ressan Jiken|ja|廷臣八十八卿列参事件}}, officials such as {{ill|Iwakurakura Toshimi|ja|岩倉具視}} and others from the pro-【攘夷】 court, numbering 88 non-aristocratic courtiers, staged a sit-in to oppose the signing of the {{ill|Treaty of Amity and Commerce|ja|修好通商条約}}. * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1863]] {{ill|April 29|ja|4月29日}}) – The {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新選組}} became custodians of the {{ill|Aizu Domain|ja|会津藩}} and began referring to themselves as the {{ill|Mibu Rōshi-gumi|ja|壬生浪士組}}.
== Births == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1633]] {{ill|April 20|ja|4月20日}}) – {{ill|Gōkōmei Tennō|ja|後光明天皇}}, the 110th {{ill|Emperor of Japan|ja|天皇}} (died [[1654]]). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永|12=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1708]] {{ill|May 2|ja|5月2日}}) – {{ill|Yuasachōzan|ja|湯浅常山}}, a Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=draft}}) (died [[1781]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1705]] {{ill|April 5|ja|4月5日}}) – {{ill|Itō Jinsai|ja|伊藤仁斎}}, a Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=draft}}) (born [[1627]]). * {{ill|Bunka|ja|文久|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1806]] {{ill|April 30|ja|4月30日}}) – {{ill|Onogawa Kisaburō|ja|小野川喜三郎}}, a 5th-generation {{ill|Yokozuna|ja|横綱}} (born [[1758]]). <「[[Uesugi Harunori]]」の記載と差異-->

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
[[cdo:3 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十二]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 12''' is the 12th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March|12=draft|12=draft}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1858]] {{ill|April 25|ja|4月25日|12=draft}}) – In the event known as {{ill|Teimin Hachijukkyo Ressan Jiken|ja|廷臣八十八卿列参事件|12=draft}}, officials such as {{ill|Iwakurakura Toshimi|ja|岩倉具視|12=draft}} and others from the pro-【攘夷】 court, numbering 88 non-aristocratic courtiers, staged a sit-in to oppose the signing of the {{ill|Treaty of Amity and Commerce|ja|修好通商条約|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1863]] {{ill|April 29|ja|4月29日|12=draft}}) – The {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新選組|12=draft}} became custodians of the {{ill|Aizu Domain|ja|会津藩|12=draft}} and began referring to themselves as the {{ill|Mibu Rōshi-gumi|ja|壬生浪士組|12=draft}}.
== Births == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft|12=draft}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1633]] {{ill|April 20|ja|4月20日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Gōkōmei Tennō|ja|後光明天皇|12=draft}}, the 110th {{ill|Emperor of Japan|ja|天皇|12=draft}} (died [[1654]]). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1708]] {{ill|May 2|ja|5月2日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Yuasachōzan|ja|湯浅常山|12=draft}}, a Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=draft|12=draft}}) (died [[1781]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1705]] {{ill|April 5|ja|4月5日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Itō Jinsai|ja|伊藤仁斎|12=draft}}, a Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=draft|12=draft}}) (born [[1627]]). * {{ill|Bunka|ja|文久|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1806]] {{ill|April 30|ja|4月30日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Onogawa Kisaburō|ja|小野川喜三郎|12=draft}}, a 5th-generation {{ill|Yokozuna|ja|横綱|12=draft}} (born [[1758]]).
== Commemorations == <!-- Add commemorations if needed -->
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|11|3|13|2|12|4|3|0312}}

revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|March 12|qq=March 12}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月十二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 12일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 12''' is the 12th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1858|1858]] [[:en:April 25|April 25]]) – In the event known as {{ill|Teimin Hachijukkyo Ressan Jiken|ja|廷臣八十八卿列参事件|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teimin Hachijukkyo Ressan Jiken|qq=}}, officials such as [[:en:Iwakura Tomomi|Iwakurakura Toshimi]] and others from the pro-【攘夷】 court, numbering 88 non-aristocratic courtiers, staged a sit-in to oppose the signing of the {{ill|Treaty of Amity and Commerce|ja|修好通商条約|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Amity and Commerce|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安政五カ国条約}}. * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:April 29|April 29]]) – The [[:en:Shinsengumi|Shinsengumi]] became custodians of the [[:en:Aizu Domain|Aizu Domain]] and began referring to themselves as the {{ill|Mibu Rōshi-gumi|ja|壬生浪士組|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mibu Rōshi-gumi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 壬生浪士}}.
== Births == * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1633|1633]] [[:en:April 20|April 20]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Kōmyō|Gōkōmei Tennō]], the 110th [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor of Japan]] (died [[:en:1654|1654]]). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1708|1708]] [[:en:May 2|May 2]]) – {{ill|Yuasachōzan|ja|湯浅常山|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yuasachōzan|qq=}}, a Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|qq=}}) (died [[:en:1781|1781]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1705|1705]] [[:en:April 5|April 5]]) – [[:en:Itō Jinsai|Itō Jinsai]], a Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|qq=}}) (born [[:en:1627|1627]]). * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunka]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1806|1806]] [[:en:April 30|April 30]]) – [[:en:Onogawa Kisaburō|Onogawa Kisaburō]], a 5th-generation {{ill|Yokozuna|ja|横綱|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokozuna|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (born [[:en:1758|1758]]).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|11|3|13|2|12|4|3|0312|qq=}}

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q839055]] Wikidata name: 12th day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:59, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 12|qq=March 12}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月十二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 12일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 12''' is the 12th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1858|1858]] [[:en:April 25|April 25]]) – In the event known as {{ill|Teimin Hachijukkyo Ressan Jiken|ja|廷臣八十八卿列参事件|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teimin Hachijukkyo Ressan Jiken|qq=|1=Teimin Hachijukkyo Ressan Jiken|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11486610}}, officials such as [[:en:Iwakura Tomomi|Iwakurakura Toshimi]] and others from the pro-【攘夷】 court, numbering 88 non-aristocratic courtiers, staged a sit-in to oppose the signing of the {{ill|Treaty of Amity and Commerce|ja|修好通商条約|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Amity and Commerce|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安政五カ国条約|1=Ansei Treaties|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1152499}}. * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:April 29|April 29]]) – The [[:en:Shinsengumi|Shinsengumi]] became custodians of the [[:en:Aizu Domain|Aizu Domain]] and began referring to themselves as the {{ill|Mibu Rōshi-gumi|ja|壬生浪士組|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mibu Rōshi-gumi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 壬生浪士|1=Mibu Rōshigumi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11242196}}.
== Births == * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1633|1633]] [[:en:April 20|April 20]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Kōmyō|Gōkōmei Tennō]], the 110th [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor of Japan]] (died [[:en:1654|1654]]). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1708|1708]] [[:en:May 2|May 2]]) – {{ill|Yuasachōzan|ja|湯浅常山|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yuasachōzan|qq=|1=Yuasa Jōzan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6565723}}, a Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|qq=|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125199930}}) (died [[:en:1781|1781]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1705|1705]] [[:en:April 5|April 5]]) – [[:en:Itō Jinsai|Itō Jinsai]], a Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|qq=|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125199930}}) (born [[:en:1627|1627]]). * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunka]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1806|1806]] [[:en:April 30|April 30]]) – [[:en:Onogawa Kisaburō|Onogawa Kisaburō]], a 5th-generation {{ill|Yokozuna|ja|横綱|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokozuna|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=yokozuna|WD=Q1067277}} (born [[:en:1758|1758]]).

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q839055]] Wikidata name: 12th day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:59, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 12|qq=March 12}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月十二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 12일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 12''' is the 12th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1858|1858]] [[:en:April 25|April 25]]) – In the event known as {{ill|Teimin Hachijukkyo Ressan Jiken|ja|廷臣八十八卿列参事件|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teimin Hachijukkyo Ressan Jiken|qq=|1=Teimin Hachijukkyo Ressan Jiken|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11486610}}, officials such as [[:en:Iwakura Tomomi|Iwakurakura Toshimi]] and others from the pro-【攘夷】 court, numbering 88 non-aristocratic courtiers, staged a sit-in to oppose the signing of the {{ill|Treaty of Amity and Commerce|ja|修好通商条約|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Amity and Commerce|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安政五カ国条約|1=Ansei Treaties|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1152499}}. * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:April 29|April 29]]) – The [[:en:Shinsengumi|Shinsengumi]] became custodians of the [[:en:Aizu Domain|Aizu Domain]] and began referring to themselves as the {{ill|Mibu Rōshi-gumi|ja|壬生浪士組|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mibu Rōshi-gumi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 壬生浪士|1=Mibu Rōshigumi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11242196}}.
== Births == * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1633|1633]] [[:en:April 20|April 20]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Kōmyō|Gōkōmei Tennō]], the 110th [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor of Japan]] (died [[:en:1654|1654]]). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1708|1708]] [[:en:May 2|May 2]]) – {{ill|Yuasachōzan|ja|湯浅常山|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yuasachōzan|qq=|1=Yuasa Jōzan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6565723}}, a Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|qq=|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125199930}}) (died [[:en:1781|1781]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1705|1705]] [[:en:April 5|April 5]]) – [[:en:Itō Jinsai|Itō Jinsai]], a Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|qq=|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125199930}}) (born [[:en:1627|1627]]). * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunka]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1806|1806]] [[:en:April 30|April 30]]) – [[:en:Onogawa Kisaburō|Onogawa Kisaburō]], a 5th-generation {{ill|Yokozuna|ja|横綱|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokozuna|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=yokozuna|WD=Q1067277}} (born [[:en:1758|1758]]).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|11|3|13|2|12|4|3|0312|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

{{translated page|ja|3月12日 (旧暦)|version=83279077|comment=Imported full ja history}}

== Events == * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1858|1858]] [[:en:April 25|April 25]]) – In the event known as {{ill|Teimin Hachijukkyo Ressan Jiken|ja|廷臣八十八卿列参事件|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teimin Hachijukkyo Ressan Jiken|qq=|1=Teimin Hachijukkyo Ressan Jiken|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11486610}}, officials such as [[:en:Iwakura Tomomi|Iwakurakura Toshimi]] and others from the pro-【攘夷】 court, numbering 88 non-aristocratic courtiers, staged a sit-in to oppose the signing of the {{ill|Treaty of Amity and Commerce|ja|修好通商条約|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Amity and Commerce|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安政五カ国条約|1=Ansei Treaties|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1152499}}. * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:April 29|April 29]]) – The [[:en:Shinsengumi|Shinsengumi]] became custodians of the [[:en:Aizu Domain|Aizu Domain]] and began referring to themselves as the {{ill|Mibu Rōshi-gumi|ja|壬生浪士組|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mibu Rōshi-gumi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 壬生浪士|1=Mibu Rōshigumi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11242196}}.
== Births == * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1633|1633]] [[:en:April 20|April 20]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Kōmyō|Gōkōmei Tennō]], the 110th [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor of Japan]] (died [[:en:1654|1654]]). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1708|1708]] [[:en:May 2|May 2]]) – {{ill|Yuasachōzan|ja|湯浅常山|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yuasachōzan|qq=|1=Yuasa Jōzan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6565723}}, a Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|qq=|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125199930}}) (died [[:en:1781|1781]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1705|1705]] [[:en:April 5|April 5]]) – [[:en:Itō Jinsai|Itō Jinsai]], a Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|qq=|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125199930}}) (born [[:en:1627|1627]]). * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunka]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1806|1806]] [[:en:April 30|April 30]]) – [[:en:Onogawa Kisaburō|Onogawa Kisaburō]], a 5th-generation {{ill|Yokozuna|ja|横綱|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokozuna|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=yokozuna|WD=Q1067277}} (born [[:en:1758|1758]]).

== Events == * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1858|1858]] [[:en:April 25|April 25]]) – In the event known as {{ill|Teimin Hachijukkyo Ressan Jiken|ja|廷臣八十八卿列参事件|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teimin Hachijukkyo Ressan Jiken|qq=|1=Teimin Hachijukkyo Ressan Jiken|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11486610}}, officials such as [[:en:Iwakura Tomomi|Iwakurakura Toshimi]] and others from the pro-【攘夷】 court, numbering 88 non-aristocratic courtiers, staged a sit-in to oppose the signing of the {{ill|Treaty of Amity and Commerce|ja|修好通商条約|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Amity and Commerce|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安政五カ国条約|1=Ansei Treaties|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1152499}}. * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:April 29|April 29]]) – The [[:en:Shinsengumi|Shinsengumi]] became custodians of the [[:en:Aizu Domain|Aizu Domain]] and began referring to themselves as the {{ill|Mibu Rōshi-gumi|ja|壬生浪士組|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mibu Rōshi-gumi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 壬生浪士|1=Mibu Rōshigumi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11242196}}.
== Births == * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1633|1633]] [[:en:April 20|April 20]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Kōmyō|Gōkōmei Tennō]], the 110th [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor of Japan]] (died [[:en:1654|1654]]). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1708|1708]] [[:en:May 2|May 2]]) – {{ill|Yuasachōzan|ja|湯浅常山|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yuasachōzan|qq=|1=Yuasa Jōzan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6565723}}, a Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|qq=|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125199930}}) (died [[:en:1781|1781]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1705|1705]] [[:en:April 5|April 5]]) – [[:en:Itō Jinsai|Itō Jinsai]], a Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|qq=|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125199930}}) (born [[:en:1627|1627]]). * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunka]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1806|1806]] [[:en:April 30|April 30]]) – [[:en:Onogawa Kisaburō|Onogawa Kisaburō]], a 5th-generation {{ill|Yokozuna|ja|横綱|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokozuna|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=yokozuna|WD=Q1067277}} (born [[:en:1758|1758]]).

== Events == * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1858|1858]] [[:en:April 25|April 25]]) – In the event known as {{ill|Teimin Hachijukkyo Ressan Jiken|ja|廷臣八十八卿列参事件|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teimin Hachijukkyo Ressan Jiken|1=Teimin Hachijukkyo Ressan Jiken|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11486610}}, officials such as [[:en:Iwakura Tomomi|Iwakurakura Toshimi]] and others from the pro-【攘夷】 court, numbering 88 non-aristocratic courtiers, staged a sit-in to oppose the signing of the {{ill|Treaty of Amity and Commerce|ja|修好通商条約|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Amity and Commerce|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安政五カ国条約|1=Ansei Treaties|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1152499}}. * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:April 29|April 29]]) – The [[:en:Shinsengumi|Shinsengumi]] became custodians of the [[:en:Aizu Domain|Aizu Domain]] and began referring to themselves as the {{ill|Mibu Rōshi-gumi|ja|壬生浪士組|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mibu Rōshi-gumi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 壬生浪士|1=Mibu Rōshigumi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11242196}}.
== Births == * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1633|1633]] [[:en:April 20|April 20]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Kōmyō|Gōkōmei Tennō]], the 110th [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor of Japan]] (died [[:en:1654|1654]]). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1708|1708]] [[:en:May 2|May 2]]) – {{ill|Yuasachōzan|ja|湯浅常山|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yuasachōzan|1=Yuasa Jōzan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6565723}}, a Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125199930}}) (died [[:en:1781|1781]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1705|1705]] [[:en:April 5|April 5]]) – [[:en:Itō Jinsai|Itō Jinsai]], a Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125199930}}) (born [[:en:1627|1627]]). * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunka]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1806|1806]] [[:en:April 30|April 30]]) – [[:en:Onogawa Kisaburō|Onogawa Kisaburō]], a 5th-generation {{ill|Yokozuna|ja|横綱|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokozuna|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=yokozuna|WD=Q1067277}} (born [[:en:1758|1758]]).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|11|3|13|2|12|4|3|0312|qq=}}

== Births == * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1633|1633]] [[:en:April 20|April 20]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Kōmyō|Gōkōmei Tennō]], the 110th [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor of Japan]] (died [[:en:1654|1654]]). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1708|1708]] [[:en:May 2|May 2]]) – {{ill|Yuasachōzan|ja|湯浅常山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yuasachōzan|1=Yuasa Jōzan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6565723}}, a Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125199930}}) (died [[:en:1781|1781]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1705|1705]] [[:en:April 5|April 5]]) – [[:en:Itō Jinsai|Itō Jinsai]], a Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125199930}}) (born [[:en:1627|1627]]). * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunka]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1806|1806]] [[:en:April 30|April 30]]) – [[:en:Onogawa Kisaburō|Onogawa Kisaburō]], a 5th-generation {{ill|Yokozuna|ja|横綱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokozuna|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=yokozuna|WD=Q1067277}} (born [[:en:1758|1758]]).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|11|3|13|2|12|4|3|0312|qq=}}

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. == Births == * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1633|1633]] [[:en:April 20|April 20]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Kōmyō|Gōkōmei Tennō]], the 110th [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor of Japan]] (died [[:en:1654|1654]]). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1708|1708]] [[:en:May 2|May 2]]) – {{ill|Yuasachōzan|ja|湯浅常山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yuasachōzan|1=Yuasa Jōzan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6565723}}, a Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125199930}}) (died [[:en:1781|1781]]).

== Deaths == * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1705|1705]] [[:en:April 5|April 5]]) – [[:en:Itō Jinsai|Itō Jinsai]], a Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125199930}}) (born [[:en:1627|1627]]). * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunka]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1806|1806]] [[:en:April 30|April 30]]) – [[:en:Onogawa Kisaburō|Onogawa Kisaburō]], a 5th-generation {{ill|Yokozuna|ja|横綱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokozuna|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=yokozuna|WD=Q1067277}} (born [[:en:1758|1758]]).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月12日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 12일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月十二]][[zh:三月十二]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839055]] Wikidata name: 12th day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:59, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 12|qq=March 12}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月十二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 12일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 12''' is the 12th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1858|1858]] [[:en:April 25|April 25]]) – In the event known as {{ill|Teimin Hachijukkyo Ressan Jiken|ja|廷臣八十八卿列参事件|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teimin Hachijukkyo Ressan Jiken|1=Teimin Hachijukkyo Ressan Jiken|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11486610}}, officials such as [[:en:Iwakura Tomomi|Iwakurakura Toshimi]] and others from the pro-【攘夷】 court, numbering 88 non-aristocratic courtiers, staged a sit-in to oppose the signing of the {{ill|Treaty of Amity and Commerce|ja|修好通商条約|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Amity and Commerce|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安政五カ国条約|1=Ansei Treaties|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1152499}}. * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:April 29|April 29]]) – The [[:en:Shinsengumi|Shinsengumi]] became custodians of the [[:en:Aizu Domain|Aizu Domain]] and began referring to themselves as the {{ill|Mibu Rōshi-gumi|ja|壬生浪士組|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mibu Rōshi-gumi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 壬生浪士|1=Mibu Rōshigumi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11242196}}.
== Births == * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1633|1633]] [[:en:April 20|April 20]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Kōmyō|Gōkōmei Tennō]], the 110th [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor of Japan]] (died [[:en:1654|1654]]). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1708|1708]] [[:en:May 2|May 2]]) – {{ill|Yuasachōzan|ja|湯浅常山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yuasachōzan|1=Yuasa Jōzan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6565723}}, a Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125199930}}) (died [[:en:1781|1781]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1705|1705]] [[:en:April 5|April 5]]) – [[:en:Itō Jinsai|Itō Jinsai]], a Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125199930}}) (born [[:en:1627|1627]]). * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunka]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1806|1806]] [[:en:April 30|April 30]]) – [[:en:Onogawa Kisaburō|Onogawa Kisaburō]], a 5th-generation {{ill|Yokozuna|ja|横綱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokozuna|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=yokozuna|WD=Q1067277}} (born [[:en:1758|1758]]).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|11|3|13|2|12|4|3|0312|qq=}}

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月十二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 12일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 12''' is the 12th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月12日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 12일]][[zh_min_nan:3 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:三月十二]][[zh:三月十二]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月12日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 12일]][[zh_min_nan:3 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:三月十二]][[zh:三月十二]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月12日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 12일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月十二]][[zh:三月十二]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839055]] Wikidata name: 12th day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:59, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 12|qq=March 12}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月十二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 12일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 12''' is the 12th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1858|1858]] [[:en:April 25|April 25]]) – In the event known as {{ill|Teimin Hachijukkyo Ressan Jiken|ja|廷臣八十八卿列参事件|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teimin Hachijukkyo Ressan Jiken|1=Teimin Hachijukkyo Ressan Jiken|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11486610}}, officials such as [[:en:Iwakura Tomomi|Iwakurakura Toshimi]] and others from the pro-【攘夷】 court, numbering 88 non-aristocratic courtiers, staged a sit-in to oppose the signing of the {{ill|Treaty of Amity and Commerce|ja|修好通商条約|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Amity and Commerce|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安政五カ国条約|1=Ansei Treaties|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1152499}}. * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:April 29|April 29]]) – The [[:en:Shinsengumi|Shinsengumi]] became custodians of the [[:en:Aizu Domain|Aizu Domain]] and began referring to themselves as the {{ill|Mibu Rōshi-gumi|ja|壬生浪士組|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mibu Rōshi-gumi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 壬生浪士|1=Mibu Rōshigumi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11242196}}.
== Births == * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1633|1633]] [[:en:April 20|April 20]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Kōmyō|Gōkōmei Tennō]], the 110th [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor of Japan]] (died [[:en:1654|1654]]). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1708|1708]] [[:en:May 2|May 2]]) – {{ill|Yuasachōzan|ja|湯浅常山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yuasachōzan|1=Yuasa Jōzan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6565723}}, a Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125199930}}) (died [[:en:1781|1781]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1705|1705]] [[:en:April 5|April 5]]) – [[:en:Itō Jinsai|Itō Jinsai]], a Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125199930}}) (born [[:en:1627|1627]]). * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunka]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1806|1806]] [[:en:April 30|April 30]]) – [[:en:Onogawa Kisaburō|Onogawa Kisaburō]], a 5th-generation {{ill|Yokozuna|ja|横綱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokozuna|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=yokozuna|WD=Q1067277}} (born [[:en:1758|1758]]).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|11|3|13|2|12|4|3|0312|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月十二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 12일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 12''' is the 12th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1858|1858]] [[:en:April 25|April 25]]) – In the event known as {{ill|Teimin Hachijukkyo Ressan Jiken|ja|廷臣八十八卿列参事件|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teimin Hachijukkyo Ressan Jiken|1=Teimin Hachijukkyo Ressan Jiken|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11486610}}, officials such as [[:en:Iwakura Tomomi|Iwakurakura Toshimi]] and others from the pro-【攘夷】 court, numbering 88 non-aristocratic courtiers, staged a sit-in to oppose the signing of the {{ill|Treaty of Amity and Commerce|ja|修好通商条約|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Amity and Commerce|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安政五カ国条約|1=Ansei Treaties|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1152499}}. * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:April 29|April 29]]) – The [[:en:Shinsengumi|Shinsengumi]] became custodians of the [[:en:Aizu Domain|Aizu Domain]] and began referring to themselves as the {{ill|Mibu Rōshi-gumi|ja|壬生浪士組|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mibu Rōshi-gumi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 壬生浪士|1=Mibu Rōshigumi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11242196}}.
== Births == * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1633|1633]] [[:en:April 20|April 20]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Kōmyō|Gōkōmei Tennō]], the 110th [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor of Japan]] (died [[:en:1654|1654]]). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1708|1708]] [[:en:May 2|May 2]]) – {{ill|Yuasachōzan|ja|湯浅常山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yuasachōzan|1=Yuasa Jōzan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6565723}}, a Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125199930}}) (died [[:en:1781|1781]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1705|1705]] [[:en:April 5|April 5]]) – [[:en:Itō Jinsai|Itō Jinsai]], a Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125199930}}) (born [[:en:1627|1627]]). * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunka]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1806|1806]] [[:en:April 30|April 30]]) – [[:en:Onogawa Kisaburō|Onogawa Kisaburō]], a 5th-generation {{ill|Yokozuna|ja|横綱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokozuna|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=yokozuna|WD=Q1067277}} (born [[:en:1758|1758]]).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|11|3|13|2|12|4|3|0312|qq=}}
