Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月十二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 12일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 12''' is the 12th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1858|en|1858|WD=Q7684|lt=1858}} {{ill|April 25|en|April 25|WD=Q2531|lt=April 25}}) – In the event known as {{ill|Teimin Hachijukkyo Ressan Jiken|ja|廷臣八十八卿列参事件|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teimin Hachijukkyo Ressan Jiken|1=Teimin Hachijukkyo Ressan Jiken|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11486610}}, officials such as {{ill|Iwakura Tomomi|en|Iwakura Tomomi|WD=Q428200|lt=Iwakurakura Toshimi}} and others from the pro-【攘夷】 court, numbering 88 non-aristocratic courtiers, staged a sit-in to oppose the signing of the {{ill|Treaty of Amity and Commerce|ja|修好通商条約|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Amity and Commerce|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安政五カ国条約|1=Ansei Treaties|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1152499}}. * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|WD=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1863|en|1863|WD=Q7701|lt=1863}} {{ill|April 29|en|April 29|WD=Q2535|lt=April 29}}) – The {{ill|Shinsengumi|en|Shinsengumi|WD=Q221031|lt=Shinsengumi}} became custodians of the {{ill|Aizu Domain|en|Aizu Domain|WD=Q4389944|lt=Aizu Domain}} and began referring to themselves as the {{ill|Mibu Rōshi-gumi|ja|壬生浪士組|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mibu Rōshi-gumi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 壬生浪士|1=Mibu Rōshigumi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11242196}}.
== Births == * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|WD=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1633|en|1633|WD=Q6870|lt=1633}} {{ill|April 20|en|April 20|WD=Q2524|lt=April 20}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Kōmyō|en|Emperor Go-Kōmyō|WD=Q329765|lt=Gōkōmei Tennō}}, the 110th {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|WD=Q208233|lt=Emperor of Japan}} (died {{ill|1654|en|1654|WD=Q6970|lt=1654}}). * {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|WD=Q1145262|lt=Hōei}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1708|en|1708|WD=Q6846|lt=1708}} {{ill|May 2|en|May 2|WD=Q2545|lt=May 2}}) – {{ill|Yuasachōzan|ja|湯浅常山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yuasachōzan|1=Yuasa Jōzan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6565723}}, a Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125199930}}) (died {{ill|1781|en|1781|WD=Q7719|lt=1781}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|WD=Q1145262|lt=Hōei}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1705|en|1705|WD=Q6830|lt=1705}} {{ill|April 5|en|April 5|WD=Q2507|lt=April 5}}) – {{ill|Itō Jinsai|en|Itō Jinsai|WD=Q640808|lt=Itō Jinsai}}, a Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125199930}}) (born {{ill|1627|en|1627|WD=Q6833|lt=1627}}). * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|WD=Q730266|lt=Bunka}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1806|en|1806|WD=Q6903|lt=1806}} {{ill|April 30|en|April 30|WD=Q2536|lt=April 30}}) – {{ill|Onogawa Kisaburō|en|Onogawa Kisaburō|WD=Q2024560|lt=Onogawa Kisaburō}}, a 5th-generation {{ill|Yokozuna|ja|横綱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokozuna|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=yokozuna|WD=Q1067277}} (born {{ill|1758|en|1758|WD=Q7639|lt=1758}}).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|11|3|13|2|12|4|3|0312|qq=}}

== Deaths == * {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|WD=Q1145262|lt=Hōei}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1705|en|1705|WD=Q6830|lt=1705}} {{ill|April 5|en|April 5|WD=Q2507|lt=April 5}}) – {{ill|Itō Jinsai|en|Itō Jinsai|WD=Q640808|lt=Itō Jinsai}}, a Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125199930}}) (born {{ill|1627|en|1627|WD=Q6833|lt=1627}}). * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|WD=Q730266|lt=Bunka}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1806|en|1806|WD=Q6903|lt=1806}} {{ill|April 30|en|April 30|WD=Q2536|lt=April 30}}) – {{ill|Onogawa Kisaburō|en|Onogawa Kisaburō|WD=Q2024560|lt=Onogawa Kisaburō}}, a 5th-generation {{ill|Yokozuna|ja|横綱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokozuna|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=yokozuna|WD=Q1067277}} (born {{ill|1758|en|1758|WD=Q7639|lt=1758}}).

{{Not to be confused with|March 12|qq=March 12}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月十二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 12일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 12''' is the 12th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.

== Births == * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|WD=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1633|en|1633|WD=Q6870|lt=1633}} {{ill|April 20|en|April 20|WD=Q2524|lt=April 20}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Kōmyō|en|Emperor Go-Kōmyō|WD=Q329765|lt=Gōkōmei Tennō}}, the 110th {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|WD=Q208233|lt=Emperor of Japan}} (died {{ill|1654|en|1654|WD=Q6970|lt=1654}}). * {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|WD=Q1145262|lt=Hōei}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1708|en|1708|WD=Q6846|lt=1708}} {{ill|May 2|en|May 2|WD=Q2545|lt=May 2}}) – {{ill|Yuasachōzan|ja|湯浅常山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yuasachōzan|1=Yuasa Jōzan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6565723}}, a Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125199930}}) (died {{ill|1781|en|1781|WD=Q7719|lt=1781}}).

{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月十二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 12일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 12''' is the 12th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1858|en|1858|WD=Q7684|lt=1858}} {{ill|April 25|en|April 25|WD=Q2531|lt=April 25}}) – In the event known as {{ill|Teimin Hachijukkyo Ressan Jiken|ja|廷臣八十八卿列参事件|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teimin Hachijukkyo Ressan Jiken|1=Teimin Hachijukkyo Ressan Jiken|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11486610}}, officials such as {{ill|Iwakura Tomomi|en|Iwakura Tomomi|WD=Q428200|lt=Iwakurakura Toshimi}} and others from the pro-【攘夷】 court, numbering 88 non-aristocratic courtiers, staged a sit-in to oppose the signing of the {{ill|Treaty of Amity and Commerce|ja|修好通商条約|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Amity and Commerce|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安政五カ国条約|1=Ansei Treaties|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1152499}}. * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|WD=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1863|en|1863|WD=Q7701|lt=1863}} {{ill|April 29|en|April 29|WD=Q2535|lt=April 29}}) – The {{ill|Shinsengumi|en|Shinsengumi|WD=Q221031|lt=Shinsengumi}} became custodians of the {{ill|Aizu Domain|en|Aizu Domain|WD=Q4389944|lt=Aizu Domain}} and began referring to themselves as the {{ill|Mibu Rōshi-gumi|ja|壬生浪士組|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mibu Rōshi-gumi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 壬生浪士|1=Mibu Rōshigumi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11242196}}.
== Births == * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|WD=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1633|en|1633|WD=Q6870|lt=1633}} {{ill|April 20|en|April 20|WD=Q2524|lt=April 20}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Kōmyō|en|Emperor Go-Kōmyō|WD=Q329765|lt=Gōkōmei Tennō}}, the 110th {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|WD=Q208233|lt=Emperor of Japan}} (died {{ill|1654|en|1654|WD=Q6970|lt=1654}}). * {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|WD=Q1145262|lt=Hōei}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1708|en|1708|WD=Q6846|lt=1708}} {{ill|May 2|en|May 2|WD=Q2545|lt=May 2}}) – {{ill|Yuasachōzan|ja|湯浅常山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yuasachōzan|1=Yuasa Jōzan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6565723}}, a Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125199930}}) (died {{ill|1781|en|1781|WD=Q7719|lt=1781}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|WD=Q1145262|lt=Hōei}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1705|en|1705|WD=Q6830|lt=1705}} {{ill|April 5|en|April 5|WD=Q2507|lt=April 5}}) – {{ill|Itō Jinsai|en|Itō Jinsai|WD=Q640808|lt=Itō Jinsai}}, a Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125199930}}) (born {{ill|1627|en|1627|WD=Q6833|lt=1627}}). * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|WD=Q730266|lt=Bunka}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1806|en|1806|WD=Q6903|lt=1806}} {{ill|April 30|en|April 30|WD=Q2536|lt=April 30}}) – {{ill|Onogawa Kisaburō|en|Onogawa Kisaburō|WD=Q2024560|lt=Onogawa Kisaburō}}, a 5th-generation {{ill|Yokozuna|ja|横綱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokozuna|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=yokozuna|WD=Q1067277}} (born {{ill|1758|en|1758|WD=Q7639|lt=1758}}).

== Deaths == * {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|WD=Q1145262|lt=Hōei|1=Hōei}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1705|en|1705|WD=Q6830|lt=1705|1=1705}} {{ill|April 5|en|April 5|WD=Q2507|lt=April 5|1=April 5}}) – {{ill|Itō Jinsai|en|Itō Jinsai|WD=Q640808|lt=Itō Jinsai|1=Itō Jinsai}}, a Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125199930}}) (born {{ill|1627|en|1627|WD=Q6833|lt=1627|1=1627}}). * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|WD=Q730266|lt=Bunka|1=Bunkyū}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1806|en|1806|WD=Q6903|lt=1806|1=1806}} {{ill|April 30|en|April 30|WD=Q2536|lt=April 30|1=April 30}}) – {{ill|Onogawa Kisaburō|en|Onogawa Kisaburō|WD=Q2024560|lt=Onogawa Kisaburō|1=Onogawa Kisaburō}}, a 5th-generation {{ill|Yokozuna|ja|横綱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokozuna|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Yokozuna|WD=Q1067277}} (born {{ill|1758|en|1758|WD=Q7639|lt=1758|1=1758}}).
